extract: Donphan (Japanese: ドンファン Donfan) is a Ground-type Pokémon introduced in Generation II. It evolves from Phanpy starting at level 25. Donphan was officially revealed in the May 1997 issue of CoroCoro, along with Slowking and Ampharos. The Paradox Pokémon Great Tusk and Iron Treads are said to be ancient and future relatives of Donphan, respectively, or versions of it from parallel timelines.
